_comment: Universal function-calling schema for mythosforge-lookgate. Hand the matching block to any tool-use LLM. Parameters identical across shapes; only the envelope differs. openai = OpenAI / Bankr LLM Gateway / Surplus / Codex / Cursor. anthropic = Claude Messages API tool-use.

image.description: Path or URL to the image to score.

rubric.description: Optional path to a JSON-array rubric; defaults to default-visual-v1.

palette.description: Optional theme/palette (e.g. a brandkit.json) to check in_palette against.

threshold.description: Optional 0..1; switches from strict-any-fail to a score threshold.

set.description: Distinctness add-on when scoring a set of assets together.

out.description: Optional path to write the verdict JSON.

function.name: mythosforge_lookgate
function.description: Score an image against a visual-QA rubric and return a structured PASS/FAIL verdict (JSON: verdict, score, criteria, fails, suggestion). The self-verify half of the MythosForge suite. Requires the caller's own GEMINI_API_KEY (or LOOKGATE_API_KEY) in the execution environment — default provider is Google Gemini vision; any OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint via --base-url.

image.description: Path or URL to the image to score.

rubric.description: Optional path to a JSON-array rubric.

palette.description: Optional theme/palette to check in_palette against.

set.description: Distinctness add-on for scoring a set.

out.description: Optional path to write the verdict JSON.

anthropic.name: mythosforge_lookgate
anthropic.description: Score an image against a visual-QA rubric and return a structured PASS/FAIL verdict (JSON: verdict, score, criteria, fails, suggestion). The self-verify half of the MythosForge suite. Requires the caller's own GEMINI_API_KEY (or LOOKGATE_API_KEY) in the execution environment — default provider is Google Gemini vision; any OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint via --base-url.

image.description: Path or URL to the image to score.

rubric.description: Optional path to a JSON-array rubric.

palette.description: Optional theme/palette to check in_palette against.

set.description: Distinctness add-on for scoring a set.

out.description: Optional path to write the verdict JSON.

invocation.note: When the model emits a tool call with the args above, the host harness maps them to this shell command and runs it (GEMINI_API_KEY or LOOKGATE_API_KEY must be set in that environment):
invocation.returns: Verdict JSON: { verdict, score, criteria, fails, suggestion, rubric_id, image }. Feed it back to the model as the tool result.
